blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
